subject: Help with CSV Import
message:
Hello Support,

I'm trying to import my client list via CSV but keep getting a 'format error' on line 42. I've double-checked the headers. Can you take a look at my file if I send it?

Best,
Alice

subject: Billing Error
message: I was charged twice for the Professional Plan this month. I demand an immediate refund! This is unacceptable service. I've been a loyal customer for a year and I expect this to be fixed NOW.

subject: API Access for Enterprise
message:
Dear TechCorp Team,

We are looking to integrate our internal CRM with your invoicing system. Could you provide the API documentation and confirm if our Enterprise plan covers the necessary rate limits for approximately 5,000 requests per day?

Regards,
Edward Norton
Ops Lead, Norton & Co.
